summary: End-to-end verified Contact form. Backend pytest (4/4 passed): POST /api/contact persists to Mongo, returns email_sent=false as expected, GET /api/contact lists it (no _id leaked), invalid email -> 422, missing fields -> 422. Frontend Playwright: hero-contact-btn scrolls to #contact; empty submit shows 'Please fill in all fields.'; invalid email shows 'Please enter a valid email address.'; valid submission shows success status 'Message sent - thanks for reaching out!...' + sonner success toast + all three inputs cleared. Contact email/LinkedIn/GitHub links render. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx correctly guards missing REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, uses 60s timeout for cold starts, distinguishes ECONNABORTED / err.response / err.request errors, and clears form only on success. Good.
backend/server.py: uses EmailStr validation, uuid ids, excludes _id from list response, and gracefully no-ops email send when RESEND_API_KEY empty (email_sent=false). Good.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ contact + one e2e_<uuid> contact inserted during testing (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact form is fully working end-to-end. User's report of 'not working' does not reproduce in preview env. RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty so email_sent=false is expected.
